message:
fix(vdbe,func,types): apply KBN compensated summation to all accumulation paths

Extend the Kahan-Babuska-Neumaier fix to remaining float accumulation sites:

1. vectorized_agg.rs: Accumulator now uses KBN for sum_f64 updates and
   adds compensation in finalize_f64() for Sum/Avg/Total
2. window_builtins.rs: WindowSumFunc step/inverse/value use KBN
3. value.rs: SumAccumulator.accumulate() uses KBN, finish() adds err term

All float summation paths in the codebase now match C SQLite's
kahanBabuskaNeumaierStep precision behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
